target.title: Fix provider static model fallback resolution
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #92009.

This makes bundled provider static-catalog rows available to `infer model run` when live/dynamic resolution misses, matching the model visibility already used by list/inspect for providers such as Google. The fallback remains bounded to bundled owning provider plugins, preserves manifest static-catalog precedence, skips untrusted workspace plugins, and avoids treating manifest refreshable/runtime rows as static fallback rows.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/provider-discovery.runtime.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.static-catalog.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/model.test.ts src/cli/capability-cli.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `pnpm tsgo:core && pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` — clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview` was visible to `infer model inspect` but `infer model run` failed with `Unknown model: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview`.

Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox packaged install with a live Google Gemini credential injected via the 1Password service-account wrapper; provider `aws`, lease `cbx_db482aa09a90`, run `run_7726822c29ea`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: packaged the branch with `npm pack`, installed the tarball globally into an isolated prefix, verified the direct Google API returned OK, then ran `openclaw infer model inspect --model google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview --json` and `openclaw infer model run --model google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview --prompt "Reply with OK only." --json`.

Evidence after fix: Crabbox run `run_7726822c29ea` completed with `exitCode: 0`; phases `direct_api`, `inspect`, and `run` all passed.

Observed result after fix: direct Google API returned `candidateText: OK`, inspect returned provider/model `google` / `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`, and model run returned output containing OK.

What was not tested: full CI was not complete at PR creation time; it will be watched after opening this PR.

## Regression repro

AWS Crabbox packaged baseline repro with the local patch reversed: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_dad58f24dc0c`, run `run_dc3a84889cab`. The direct Google API returned OK and `inspect` saw the model, but `infer model run` failed with the expected `Unknown model: google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview` error.
target.author: joshavant
